heading: Nondisplacement
label: 1728 Nondisplacement
text: The nondisplacement requirements of shall be applicable to all activities carried out by the Public Lands Corps, to all activities carried out under this subchapter by a qualified youth or conservation corps, and to the selection and service of resource assistants.section 12637 of title 42
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 213 and is classified to .section 211 of Pub. L. 91–378section 1730 of this title
